summary: A superb soundboard capture of a monumental Other One suite – crisp recording, epic jams and stellar performances.
review: The second set delivers one of the most thrilling Other One sequences of the Fall‑71 era, with Cryptical Envelopment, multiple drum/space excursions and Me & My Uncle weaving into a thirty‑minute odyssey.  The soundboard source is generally clear and well balanced, though a few listeners have noted odd timing discrepancies between playback programs.  Overall the show is hailed as a must‑have highlight of any 1971 collection.

ai_rating.rationale: Four out of five reviews rate the performance as exceptional (5★) and praise the Other One suite; recording issues are minor and do not detract from overall enjoyment, yielding a strong combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and balanced soundboard capture. A handful of users reported inconsistent track durations across playback tools, but no major audio defects were noted.

standout_songs: Cryptical Envelopment > Drums > Space > Me And My Uncle (suite)
Not Fade Away / Goin' Down the Road Feeling Bad
show_quality.setlist_flow: An explosive second set dominated by an extended Other One suite that weaves through Cryptical Envelopment, multiple drum/space jams and Me & My Uncle, delivering the intense, exploratory vibe characteristic of late‑1971 shows.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil’s bass work is highlighted as especially engaged, driving the new dynamics in the Other One sequence.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith’s entrance adds a fresh texture to the jams; his organ work is noted especially during the intense Uncle sections.
